task_completion.description: Run the unsteady flow simulation for Plan 04.
task_completion.visual_evidence: HEC-RAS computation window showing the execution of Plan 04, or terminal output indicating the simulation was successfully run.

task_completion.description: Extract required data from the HDF5 output.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A script (e.g., Python using h5py) or tool visible on screen that opens the HDF5 output file and extracts Peak WSE, Flow Area, Top Width, and Minimum Channel Elevation.

task_completion.description: Calculate Shape Factor and classify the channel shape.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code or formulas visible calculating Hydraulic Depth (Flow Area / Top Width), Max Depth (Peak WSE - Min Elevation), Shape Factor (Hydraulic Depth / Max Depth), and applying the classification logic (Triangular, Parabolic, Rectangular).

task_completion.description: Save the results to the specified CSV file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code or terminal command saving the output to /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/channel_shape_analysis.csv.

task_completion.description: Ensure the CSV contains the required columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The generated CSV file is shown (e.g., via cat, head, or a CSV viewer) containing the columns: River_Station, Peak_WSE, Flow_Area, Top_Width, Hydraulic_Depth, Max_Depth, Shape_Factor, and Classification.

integrity.description: Verify that the simulation was actually executed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the HEC-RAS application or runs a valid command to execute the simulation, rather than just skipping to creating a CSV.

integrity.description: Verify that the calculations and classifications are performed programmatically.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses code or a spreadsheet to compute the values and classifications based on the extracted data, rather than hardcoding a pre-made list of answers.

integrity.description: Verify that data is genuinely extracted from the HDF5 file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent's script explicitly references and reads from the HEC-RAS HDF5 output file (e.g., .p04.hdf) instead of using a mock data source.
